VIERRA, FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS SET ON DEC-03-2021 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. OSC WILL BE DISCHARGED IF SANCTIONS ARE PAID PRIOR TO THE HEARING DATE. CASE IS ORDERED FOR A FURTHER MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WITH JUDGE STEPHEN MURPHY. PARTIES WILL EMAIL JUDGE MURPHY BY 4:00 PM TODAY TO SCHEDULE THE MSC. TRIAL DATE IS CONTINUED TO DEC-15-2021 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. PARTIES WAIVE NOTICE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K.
